title: B1 (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:E-5C_B1_Trooper_SWL_Calvin_Chua.png|thumb|right|250px|A B1 battle droid]]
'''B1''' could refer to:

===[[Canon]]===
*'''[[B1 (Colossus)]]''', a [[battle droid]] who was sold to [[Kragan Gorr]] and worked with [[Neeku Vozo]] of the [[Colossus]]
*'''[[B1-series battle droid]]''', the main [[infantry]] of the [[Trade Federation Droid Army]] and [[Separatist Droid Army]]

===[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]===
*'''[[B1-series worker droid]]''', a [[Labor droid/Legends|labor droid]] built by [[AccuTronics/Legends|AccuTronics]]
*'''[[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]''', the primary soldiers of the [[Trade Federation Droid Army/Legends|Trade Federation]] and [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Armies]]

{{Disambig}}
